title: andrachne ovalis
intro: Andrachne ovalis, also known as the Indian mercury or mercury vine, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Andrachne ovalis include its use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Andrachne ovalis typically involve boiling or decocting the plant's leaves and roots in water to create a tea or infusion that can be used to treat various health issues.
